title: GDC Vault
creator: Game Developers Conference
description: The official archive of GDC session videos, audio, and presentation material, combining free records with subscriber-only sessions.
useful: The largest single professional-talk collection in this catalogue; search by speaker, discipline, event, or game.
audience: Developers and students searching for professional talks by discipline, speaker, event, or game.
learning: Search a large professional conference archive
Separate free sessions from subscriber material
Use talks as starting points for deeper research

editorial.note: Kept as a catalogue-only source directory rather than a learning-path step because it spans thousands of sessions and multiple disciplines.
